text:
## Per-Repository Health Report

| Repository | Open PRs | Merged PRs Closing Linear Issue |
|---|---|---|
| **acme/api** | 7 | 2 |
| **acme/infra** | 7 | 4 |
| **acme/mobile** | 8 | 6 |
| **acme/web** | 14 | 3 |

**Repository with the most open pull requests: acme/web** (14 open PRs — nearly twice as many as any other repo).

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT
  repo,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'open') AS open_pr_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL) AS merged_with_linear
FROM github_pull_requests
GROUP BY repo
ORDER BY repo"}
